description: Composition Black trunks made of 80% nylon and 20% elastane shell with 100% polyester lining, that has white stripe running down the sides, elasticated waist band with white drawstrings on the inside and brand logo embossed on the left Fitting Slim Wash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach or tumble dry Do not iron Do not dry clean Comfortable, fitted and sleek - that describes these swimming trunks from puma. Feel at ease with every stroke in this flexible trunks while you know you can dry them in a jiffy after a wonderful swimming session. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 39" Height-5.8", Waist-26"
